strategy_description: Joint VEV half-spread from ATM IV minus short RV of extract; BS fair from global smile; extract/hydrogel MM with regime-scaled width. Baseline widen/tighten gains K_WIDEN=10, K_TIGHTEN=5, RV_WIN=40.
Grid sweep: stronger IV-rich widening (K_WIDEN=14), gentler IV-cheap tightening (K_TIGHTEN=4), shorter RV window (30), slightly larger VEV clips.
Keep v0 RV/IV core; reduce hydrogel adverse selection (wider base half-spread, smaller size, low regime coupling) after day 2 hydrogel drawdown in v0/v1.

Child of v2: same ATM IV - RV joint-width thesis, adds controlled VEV mispricing takes around the same BS-smile theo anchor (TAKE_EDGE_MULT=0.60, MAX_TAKE_PER_SIDE=28) and slightly larger VEV clip size.
Child sweep from v2/v3: keep same regime core, more conservative taking (TAKE_EDGE_MULT=0.70, MAX_TAKE_PER_SIDE=16) and extra hydrogel width buffer (BASE_H_HALF=4). Prior best in prior loop.
Child of v4: tighter take trigger and smaller per-side take size (TAKE_EDGE_MULT=0.78, MAX_TAKE_PER_SIDE=12); underperformed v4.
v4 + per-tick delta hedge on VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT (BS call delta of smile-IV, DELTA_HEDGE_STRENGTH=0.4, MAX_D_HEDGE_QTY=50). Falsified vs v4 on this tape; keep hedge optional off in base.
v4 + lighter delta hedge and larger VEV quote size. Still under v4; no further hedge tuning this round.
Grid on v4: slightly more aggressive VEV take (TAKE_EDGE_MULT=0.65, MAX_TAKE_PER_SIDE=18). Slight edge vs v4 (59253).
Grid on v4: more conservative VEV take (TAKE_EDGE_MULT=0.74, MAX_TAKE_PER_SIDE=14). Regression vs v4/v8.
Micro-sweep on v8: TAKE_EDGE_MULT=0.63, MAX_TAKE_PER_SIDE=18. Best in this work session.
Micro-sweep on v8: TAKE_EDGE_MULT=0.67, MAX_TAKE_PER_SIDE=18. Under v10.
v10 + light theta blend: scale IV−RV regime by 1+THETA_REGIME_WEIGHT*boost(−θ_atm/price), THETA_REGIME_WEIGHT=0.2, NORM=0.04. Best among first theta try.
v10 + stronger theta blend (W=0.32, NORM=0.05). Slight regression vs v12.
Micro-sweep on v12 theta: W=0.16, NORM=0.04. Best in this work session (59976).
Micro-sweep on v12 theta: W=0.26, NORM=0.04. Under v14.
v14 + VEV_HALF_MAX=32 (cap joint width; default was 40). Tied v14 at 59976.
v14 + TAKE_EDGE_MULT=0.60. Regression vs v14.
v14 + TAKE_EDGE_MULT=0.66. Slight regression vs v14.
v14 + THETA_REGIME_WEIGHT=0.18. Slight regression vs v14.
v14 + VEV_HALF_MAX=25. Tied v14 at 59976.
v14 + TAKE_EDGE_MULT=0.615. Regression vs v14.
v14 + mild directional center shift from regime sign (REGIME_CENTER_SHIFT=0.35); no improvement.
v14 + very mild directional center shift (0.20); near tie but below v14.
v14 + stronger center shift (0.50); regression.
v14 + slightly wider extract/hydrogel regime widths (REG_EX_SCALE=0.50, REG_H_SCALE=0.10); regression.
v14 + wider extract width only (REG_EX_SCALE=0.55, REG_H_SCALE=0.08). New best in this session.
v26 micro-sweep REG_EX_SCALE=0.52; regressed to v25-level.
v26 micro-sweep with TAKE_EDGE_MULT=0.635; best in session by small margin.
v28 + mild gamma scaling of joint IV−RV regime (GAMMA_REGIME_WEIGHT=0.12, NORM=0.0008). New best on R3 0–2.
v28 + stronger gamma scaling (GAMMA_REGIME_WEIGHT=0.22). Slight regression vs v29.
v28 with TAKE_EDGE_MULT=0.63 (else same as v28). Regression vs v28.
v28 with TAKE_EDGE_MULT=0.64. Small regression vs v28.
v29 + strike-aware VEV sizing/taking map from propagation beta/delta analysis (aggressive ITM emphasis, de-emphasize far OTM); improves PnL.
v29 + moderate strike-aware map (simpler). Matches v29-level but below v33.
v33 micro-sweep with even lower far-OTM size/take and slight 5200 bump; ties v33.
v33 simplified two-bucket map (more conservative mid strikes); regressed.
v33 + shock: add SHOCK_VEV_HALF_ADD=0.5 when |d log S|>=0.0012; tied v33 in aggregate (60627).
v33 + milder shock: add=0.4, threshold=0.0014; tied.
v33 + strong shock: add=1.0, threshold=0.0008; still tied 60627 on this tape.
v33 + per-strike shock widening map from up/down spread asymmetry; tied best.
v33 + milder per-strike shock widening map; tied best.

v33 + sign-conditioned shock widening: low strikes (4000-5200) extra half width on extract up-moves, 5200-5500 on down-moves (from propagation_asymmetry up-vs-down spread asymmetry). Tied 60,627 under worse matching.

Champion v33 with TRADE_HYDROGEL=False (no new hydrogel MM); benchmark vs extract+all-VEV. Total PnL 49,755 from activitiesLog end-of-tape pnl; hydrogel notional in trade log is carry from prior days.
v33 + VEV_HALF_LOCAL_ADD_MAP from tape: mean within-tick corr(vega@model_iv, top spread) ~ -0.45; per-strike mean(spread)-pool offsets scaled 0.07. Regression vs v33.
v33 + wing-only positive offsets (max(0, mean_spread-mean_pool)) scaled 0.09; avoids tightening OTM from negative offsets. Still below v33 at 56,912.
v33 + joint 5200/5300 BBO spread<=2 gate: size up + slightly tighter quotes when tight, down + wider when loose. TRADE_HYDROGEL=False. Four historical days (0-3).
Gate retune: tight regime half_mult=1.0 (no quote tightening); looser size/width nudge. No hydrogel.
Loose-side only risk-off when gate off; tight side 1.0. No hydrogel.
vouchers_final_strategy only: mid-only MM + joint 5200/5300 gate; no hydrogel, no smile. Baseline for pivot.
Gate + BS model_iv/bs_call theo (math from trader_v0), tight/wide size and take; regime is gate only, not IV-RV. No hydrogel.
